name: codex-auto-memory
description: A Markdown-first, local-first memory runtime for Codex with wrapper, hook, MCP, skill, and AGENTS integration surfaces.

scripts.pack:release: rimraf .release-artifacts && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.release-artifacts', { recursive: true })" && npm pack --pack-destination .release-artifacts
scripts.test:cli-smoke: node --max-old-space-size=6144 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run test/audit.test.ts test/doctor-command.test.ts test/hooks-command.test.ts test/integrations-command.test.ts test/mcp-command.test.ts test/skills-command.test.ts test/memory-command.test.ts test/recall-command.test.ts test/session-command.test.ts test/wrapper-session-continuity.test.ts
scripts.test:reviewer-smoke: node --max-old-space-size=6144 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run test/docs-contract.test.ts test/doctor-command.test.ts test/hooks-command.test.ts test/integrations-command.test.ts test/mcp-command.test.ts test/skills-command.test.ts test/memory-command.test.ts test/recall-command.test.ts test/session-command.test.ts test/wrapper-session-continuity.test.ts test/session-continuity.test.ts
scripts.verify:smoke-release: pnpm build && pnpm test:dist-cli-smoke:only && pnpm pack:check && pnpm test:tarball-install-smoke
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm test:docs-contract && pnpm test:reviewer-smoke && pnpm test:cli-smoke && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm verify:smoke-release

author: Boulea7
